title: 用Python写一个简单的Telegram Bot
excerpt: 引言随着国内的互联网环境越来越差,越来越多的人转移到了国外更开放安全的聊天平台,Telegram是首选,Telergam的功能强大,Sticker,Group,Channel和Bot系统让人爱不释手,今天有兴趣就用Python写了一个Todolist Bot,下面分享一下开发过程 注册bot在Telegram里找到Bot Father注册一个Bot 搭建环境Telegram如此著名,当然有很多封装好的python库,我选用了python-telegram-bot 安装依赖 1pip installl python-telegram-bot 来一个Hello World 12345678from telegram.ext import UpdaterTOKEN='#id:#token'def message(bot, update): update.message.reply_text('Hello World!')updater = Updater(token=TOKEN)updater.dispatcher.add_handler(MessageHandler(Filters.text,message))updater.start_polling()updater.idle() 至此,一个最简的环境搭起来了上面的代码是这样工作的 创建了一个updater,用来接受telegram的update事件 注册一个消息事件回调,所有接收到的消息都会走MessageHandler,Filters.text过滤只接受text类型事件,当有消息发来之后调用message方法, 收到message之后,调用update.message.reply_text(‘Hello World!’)回复一条消息 updater.start_polling()启动接受消息 updater.idle()保证进程一直处于活跃状态 当然,它现在什么也做不了,只能永远说Hello world,下面我们,来扩充他

title: 基于 Celery 的简易的分布式程序架构
excerpt: 关于 Celery引用自 Celery 官方 Celery 是一个简单、灵活且可靠的，处理大量消息的分布式系统，并且提供维护这样一个系统的必需工具。 它是一个专注于实时处理的任务队列，同时也支持任务调度。 Celery 是开源的，使用 BSD 许可证 授权。 Celery 基础知识Celery 最重要的概念就是任务队列(Task Query),客户端(Client),中间件(Broker),存储后端(Backend),职程(Worker) 任务队列用于跨线程或跨机器分配工作任务,任务队列保存在中间件中. 客户端向中间件输入一个工作单元(Work Unit),职程时刻监视队列从中取出工作单元来执行. 如果需要追踪和存储Task的运行结果,需要有一个backend,这个backend可以是redis,数据库,或者是Rabbitmq都可以 职程执行完之后可以选择丢弃结果直接结束,或者将结果传回中间件,客户端可以通过任务id取回执行结果. 职程也可以不需要客户端调用,初始化的时候自己运行一个定时任务 中间件(Broker)Celery 中间件是用来存任务队列和任务返回的,Celery支持多种消息队列下面是Celery原生支持的Broker类型 Name Status Monitoring Remote Control RabbitMQ Stable Yes Yes Redis Stable Yes Yes Amazon SQS Stable No No Zookeeper Experimental No No 下文都以RabbitMQ为例子

title: OpenVPN 内建包过滤器
excerpt: 这是OpenVPN比较隐蔽的一个功能，虽说文档里没有提及，但是功能是完备的，可以用来做通用防火墙 开启包过滤系统OpenVPN 的很多钩子函数可以直接通过–up, –down, –tls-verify等脚本钩子直接调用，但是内置的过滤钩子（OPENVPN_PLUGIN_ENABLE_PF）只能用插件来启用，下面是用来开启内置PF的插件demo源码123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445/* minimal_pf.c * ultra-minimal OpenVPN plugin to enable internal packet filter */#include <stdio.h>#include <stdlib.h>#include "openvpn-plugin.h"/* dummy context, as we need no state */struct plugin_context { int dummy;};/* Initialization function */OPENVPN_EXPORT openvpn_plugin_handle_t openvpn_plugin_open_v1 (unsigned int *type_mask, const char *argv[], const char *envp[]) { struct plugin_context *context; /* Allocate our context */ context = (struct plugin_context *) calloc (1, sizeof (struct plugin_context)); /* Which callbacks to intercept. */ *type_mask = OPENVPN_PLUGIN_MASK (OPENVPN_PLUGIN_ENABLE_PF); return (openvpn_plugin_handle_t) context;}/* Worker function */OPENVPN_EXPORT int openvpn_plugin_func_v2 (openvpn_plugin_handle_t handle, const int type, const char *argv[], const char *envp[], void *per_client_context, struct openvpn_plugin_string_list **return_list) { if (type == OPENVPN_PLUGIN_ENABLE_PF) { return OPENVPN_PLUGIN_FUNC_SUCCESS; } else { /* should not happen! */ return OPENVPN_PLUGIN_FUNC_ERROR; }}/* Cleanup function */OPENVPN_EXPORT void openvpn_plugin_close_v1 (openvpn_plugin_handle_t handle) { struct plugin_context *context = (struct plugin_context *) handle; free (context);} 下载OpenVPN源并编译12345INCLUDE="-I/path/to/openvpn/source" # CHANGE THIS!!!!CC_FLAGS="-O2 -Wall -g"NAME=minimal_pfgcc $CC_FLAGS -fPIC -c $INCLUDE $NAME.c && \gcc $CC_FLAGS -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,$NAME.so -o $NAME.so $NAME.o -lc 然后在Openvpn的配置文件里加入plugin /path/to/the/minimal_pf.so即可开启内置包过滤器功能 配置包过滤系统配置规则下面的规则 ACCEPT 规则表示默认允许连接所有客户端， - 表示排除kaive和passion， DROP 规则表示默认拒绝，但是允许连接 10.2.0.0/16 网段。对于 CLIENTS 和 SUBNETS 都有 ACCEPT 与 DROP 两种规则 123456[CLIENTS ACCEPT]-kaive-passion[SUBNETS DROP]+10.2.0.0/16[END] 也可以用下面这种规则，DROP 所有网段，但是允许 10.2.0.0/16 网段，但是不允许该网段内的 10.2.1.0/24 网段

title: Centos 安装配置 OpenVPN
excerpt: 安装必须软件 添加 Extra Packages for Enterprise Linux 库 1yum install -y epel-release 安装 OpenVPN 以及相关依赖 1yum install -y openvpn lzo openssl pam 生成证书 安装 EasyRSA 环境 123wget "https://github.com/OpenVPN/easy-rsa/releases/download/3.0.1/EasyRSA-3.0.1.tgz"tar axvf EasyRSA-3.0.1.tgzcd EasyRSA-3.0.1 制作根证书 123456./easyrsa init-pki # 初始化证书目录pki./easyrsa build-ca nopass # 创建根证书，提示输入Common Name，名称随意，但是不能和服务端证书或客户端证书名称相同./easyrsa gen-dh # 生成Diffle Human参数，它能保证密钥在网络中安全传输./easyrsa build-server-full server nopass # server是服务端证书名称./easyrsa build-client-full kaive nopass # kaive是客户端证书名称mv pki /etc/openvpn 配置 OpenVPN 服务端 编辑 /etc/openvpn/server.conf12345678910111213141516171819202122port 1194proto tcpdev tunca /etc/openvpn/pki/ca.crtcert /etc/openvpn/pki/issued/server.crtkey /etc/openvpn/pki/private/server.keydh /etc/openvpn/pki/dh.pemserver 192.168.254.0 255.255.255.0 # 分配IP段ifconfig-pool-persist /etc/openvpn/ip.txt # 记录客户端和虚拟ip的映射关系push "redirect-gateway def1 bypass-dhcp" # 重定向客户端网关push "dhcp-option DNS 8.8.8.8" client-to-clientkeepalive 10 120compress lz4-v2push "compress lz4-v2"user nobodygroup nobodypersist-keypersist-tunstatus /var/log/openvpn-status.loglog /var/log/openvpn.logverb 3 # 日志等级 配置客户端 创建文件client.ovpn1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132clientdev tunremote {server ip}resolv-retry infinitenobindpersist-keypersist-tunca [inline]cert [inline]key [inline]verb 1keepalive 10 120port 1194proto tcpcipher BF-CBCcomp-lzoremote-cert-tls server<ca>-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----ca.crt内容-----END CERTIFICATE-----</ca><cert>-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----client.crt内容-----END CERTIFICATE-----</cert><key>-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----client.key内容-----END PRIVATE KEY-----</key> 客户端导入配置文件即可 开启NAT

title: Android C语言调用system失败原因
excerpt: 问题原因最近使用C语言写一个不依赖Java的Android底层应用，一切正常，但是在调用system()函数时，总是会不报错跳过。研究了很久，终于捕获到原因。 问题所在查看了一下system函数的实现，发现猫腻所在123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930#include <sys/types.h>#include <sys/wait.h>#include <errno.h>#include <unistd.h>int system(const char * cmdstring){ pid_t pid; int status; if(cmdstring == NULL){ return (1); } if((pid = fork())<0){ status = -1; } else if(pid = 0){ execl("/bin/sh", "sh", "-c", cmdstring, (char *)0); -exit(127); } else{ while(waitpid(pid, &status, 0) < 0){ if(errno != EINTER){ status = -1; break; } } } return status;} system实际上是fork和exec组合实现的，重点在于exec中指定了使用/bin/sh执行命令，但是Android的sh在/system/bin/sh里，所以这里会报错 问题解决两种方法，重新实现system函数，修改exec里的参数，或者直接使用fork和exec来调用系统命令

title: CentOS7配置MariaDB+Galera+Nginx高可用数据库集群
excerpt: 1、安装基本组件配置软件源添加MariaDB源12345[mariadb]name = MariaDBbaseurl = http://yum.mariadb.org/10.1/centos7-amd64gpgkey=https://yum.mariadb.org/RPM-GPG-KEY-MariaDBgpgcheck=1 安装软件安装相应的软件yum install mariadb-server rsync 2、集群配置配置hosts编辑/etc/hosts 12345127.0.0.1 localhost localhost.localdomain localhost4 localhost4.localdomain4::1 localhost localhost.localdomain localhost6 localhost6.localdomain6192.168.0.11 mariadb1192.168.0.12 mariadb2192.168.0.13 mariadb3 配置数据库

title: Centos7配置Kubernetes集群
excerpt: 1、安装基本组件安装软件在所有Master与Node安装软件etcd提供高可用的配置数据库flannel负责集群之间的网络通信yum install etcd flannel docker kubernetes 2、基本配置系统配置关闭firewalld12systemctl stop firewalldsystemctl disable firewalld 关闭selinux,编辑/etc/selinux/config1234567891011# This file controls the state of SELinux on the system.# SELINUX= can take one of these three values:# enforcing - SELinux security policy is enforced.# permissive - SELinux prints warnings instead of enforcing.# disabled - No SELinux policy is loaded.SELINUX=disabled# SELINUXTYPE= can take one of three two values:# targeted - Targeted processes are protected,# minimum - Modification of targeted policy. Only selected processes are protected. # mls - Multi Level Security protection.SELINUXTYPE=targeted 保存并重启电脑 配置Docker因为国内连接dockerhub不畅，也许需要配置代理或者镜像服务器，并且关闭selinux配置，编辑/etc/sysconfig/docker12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243# Modify these options if you want to change the way the docker daemon runsOPTIONS='--selinux-enabled=false --log-driver=journald --signature-verification=false'if [ -z "${DOCKER_CERT_PATH}" ]; then DOCKER_CERT_PATH=/etc/dockerfi# If you want to add your own registry to be used for docker search and docker# pull use the ADD_REGISTRY option to list a set of registries, each prepended# with --add-registry flag. The first registry added will be the first registry# searched.#ADD_REGISTRY='--add-registry registry.access.redhat.com'http_proxy="http://192.168.0.1:8118"https_proxy="http://192.168.0.1:8118"# If you want to block registries from being used, uncomment the BLOCK_REGISTRY# option and give it a set of registries, each prepended with --block-registry# flag. For example adding docker.io will stop users from downloading images# from docker.io# BLOCK_REGISTRY='--block-registry'# If you have a registry secured with https but do not have proper certs# distributed, you can tell docker to not look for full authorization by# adding the registry to the INSECURE_REGISTRY line and uncommenting it.# INSECURE_REGISTRY='--insecure-registry'# On an SELinux system, if you remove the --selinux-enabled option, you# also need to turn on the docker_transition_unconfined boolean.# setsebool -P docker_transition_unconfined 1# Location used for temporary files, such as those created by# docker load and build operations. Default is /var/lib/docker/tmp# Can be overriden by setting the following environment variable.# DOCKER_TMPDIR=/var/tmp# Controls the /etc/cron.daily/docker-logrotate cron job status.# To disable, uncomment the line below.# LOGROTATE=false## docker-latest daemon can be used by starting the docker-latest unitfile.# To use docker-latest client, uncomment below lines#DOCKERBINARY=/usr/bin/docker-latest#DOCKER_CONTAINERD_BINARY=/usr/bin/docker-containerd-latest#DOCKER_CONTAINERD_SHIM_BINARY=/usr/bin/docker-containerd-shim-latest
